notes: Read SKILL.md (Workflow B + Example 4 turn 3 closet template). Authored ops.json with a single add_room op: name=MasterCloset, kind/label='Walk-In Closet', size 4x8, relativePosition right-of MasterBedroom align top, all-solid walls. First attempt used 'relativeTo' (per the SKILL example) and modify.mjs rejected it with "Room must have either 'position' or 'relativePosition'"; checked floorplan-mcp-server/src/utils/ast-editor.ts RoomParams and rekeyed to relativePosition. Re-ran modify.mjs --out with-closet.floorplan -> success, MasterCloset appended inside the GroundFloor block. Single verification pass: validate.mjs returns valid=true with one info-level warning (rooms 'MasterBath' and 'MasterCloset' overlap because the seed already has MasterBath right-of MasterBedroom; the prompt explicitly anchored the closet to the right side of Master, so the overlap follows from the literal anchor and is not a validity error). Assertions covered: validate (valid=true), room_present MasterCloset, kind_count closet>=1 (label 'Walk-In Closet' + name 'MasterCloset' both classify as closet via grader's inferKindFromName).
